# Audit Configuration

<!-- Auto-generated by rice-setup-audit. Edit manually or re-run /rice-setup-audit to regenerate. -->

## Project

language: rust
framework: slint
audit_mode: fresh
previous_reports_archived: true
verify_all_completions: true

## Paths

ui_files: rust/crates/crispy-ui/ui/\*_/_.slint
backend_wiring: rust/crates/crispy-ui/src/event_bridge.rs
state_globals: [AppState, PlayerState, OnboardingState, DiagnosticsState, Theme]
state_files: [rust/crates/crispy-ui/ui/globals/app-state.slint, rust/crates/crispy-ui/ui/globals/theme.slint, rust/crates/crispy-ui/ui/screens/player.slint, rust/crates/crispy-ui/ui/screens/onboarding.slint, rust/crates/crispy-ui/ui/components/diagnostics-panel.slint]
design_tokens_file: rust/crates/crispy-ui/ui/globals/theme.slint
event_definitions: rust/crates/crispy-ui/src/events.rs
event_handlers: [rust/crates/crispy-ui/src/data_engine.rs, rust/crates/crispy-ui/src/event_bridge.rs]
screens: [home, live-tv, epg, movies, series, search, settings, library, onboarding, player, vod-detail, series-detail]
screen_files_pattern: rust/crates/crispy-ui/ui/screens/\*.slint
test_command: cargo test --workspace
build_command: cargo check --workspace
format_command: cargo fmt --all
lint_command: cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

## Slint Markup-Only Audit

Enforce: `.slint` files must be pure markup — no multi-line callback bodies, no state machines, no business logic.

audit_slint_markup:
  patterns_forbidden_in_slint:
    - "multi-line callback bodies (more than one statement inside `=> { ... }`)"
    - "if/else control flow blocks (not ternary property bindings)"
    - "data transformation or computation"
    - "direct model manipulation"
    - "navigation logic or state management"
  patterns_allowed_in_slint:
    - "property declarations (in, out, in-out)"
    - "reactive bindings (e.g., `visible: root.show-panel`)"
    - "ternary style bindings (e.g., `color: is-focused ? white : gray`)"
    - "animate declarations"
    - "callback signature declarations"
    - "one-line callback forwarding (e.g., `clicked => { root.selected(); }`)"
  scan_files: "rust/crates/crispy-ui/ui/**/*.slint, rust/crates/slint-crispy-vscroll/ui/**/*.slint"
  severity: Critical

## Component Crate Coverage Audit

Enforce: standalone component crates must maintain ≥95% line coverage.

audit_component_coverage:
  crates:
    - name: slint-crispy-vscroll
      path: rust/crates/slint-crispy-vscroll
      min_coverage: 95
      coverage_command: "cargo tarpaulin -p slint-crispy-vscroll --features full --skip-clean"
  severity: Critical

## Skill Mandate Audit

Enforce: `/slint-expert` skill must be invoked before creating or modifying any `.slint` file.

audit_skill_mandate:
  trigger_files: "**/*.slint"
  required_skill: slint-expert
  severity: Major

## Requirements

srs_docs: [.ai/planning/REQUIREMENTS.md]
design_spec: .ai/crispy_tivi_design_spec.md
design_context: .impeccable.md
vscroll_specs: [.ai/slint-crispy-vscroll/spec/00-index.md]
health_report: .ai/planning/UI-HEALTH-REPORT.md

## Audit Quality Rules (MANDATORY for all audit agents)

1. **NEVER trust prior reports** — verify every claim against current code
2. **NEVER mark a callback as UNHANDLED** without tracing the full 3-layer chain (component → parent → Rust)
3. **Search ALL .rs files** in crispy-ui/src/, not just event_bridge.rs — properties may be set in main.rs, data_engine.rs, or other modules
4. **Verify every journey against actual code paths** — don't assume PASS from prior sessions
5. **All 47 journeys MUST be traced** — no sampling, no skipping
6. **Classify Epoch-planned items correctly** — stub handlers with logging are PARTIAL (not FAIL), features with no code path are FAIL
7. **False positive prevention** — before reporting an issue, search for at least 3 alternate locations where the fix might exist

## slint-crispy-vscroll Component Requirements

vscroll_crate:
  path: rust/crates/slint-crispy-vscroll
  integration_module: rust/crates/crispy-ui/src/scroll_integration.rs
  wiring_file: rust/crates/crispy-ui/src/event_bridge.rs

audit_vscroll_usage:
  description: "Verify slint-crispy-vscroll is used correctly across crispy-ui"
  checks:
    - id: VSCROLL-01
      name: "No hand-rolled scroll logic"
      rule: "crispy-ui must NOT contain manual scroll position tracking, window slicing, or focus index arithmetic. All scroll behavior delegated to ScrollBridge / VirtualScroller."
      scan_for_violations: ["shift_to(", "window_start", "window_end", "move_focus(", "scroll_offset +=", "scroll_position +="]
      exclude: [scroll_integration.rs]
      severity: Critical

    - id: VSCROLL-02
      name: "ScrollBridge for all scrollable lists"
      rule: "Every scrollable content list (channels, movies, series, search results, EPG) must use ScrollBridge from scroll_integration.rs — not raw VecModel windowing."
      severity: Critical

    - id: VSCROLL-03
      name: "No reimplemented physics"
      rule: "crispy-ui must NOT contain friction, momentum, snap, rubber-band, or spring math. All physics delegated to slint-crispy-vscroll."
      scan_for_violations: ["friction *=", "velocity *=", "momentum", "rubber_band", "snap_to_nearest", "spring_force"]
      exclude: [scroll_integration.rs]
      severity: Critical

    - id: VSCROLL-04
      name: "Quick presets used where appropriate"
      rule: "Standard scroll configurations should use QuickPreset (TvVertical, TvGrid, etc.) not manual ScrollerConfig construction. Custom configs only for EPG or non-standard layouts."
      severity: Major

    - id: VSCROLL-05
      name: "Pool size matches viewport"
      rule: "ScrollBridge pool size must accommodate the viewport. CHANNEL_WINDOW=15 for channels, VOD_WINDOW=45 for movies/series grids."
      severity: Major

    - id: VSCROLL-06
      name: "Coverage maintained"
      rule: "slint-crispy-vscroll must maintain ≥95% line coverage. Run: cargo tarpaulin -p slint-crispy-vscroll --features full --skip-clean"
      severity: Critical

    - id: VSCROLL-07
      name: "No direct slot manipulation"
      rule: "crispy-ui must NOT directly create or modify SlotDescriptor/RuntimeSlot. All slot lifecycle managed by VirtualScroller through ScrollBridge."
      scan_for_violations: ["RuntimeSlot::new", "SlotDescriptor::default()", ".assign(", ".free()"]
      exclude: [scroll_integration.rs]
      severity: Critical

## User Journeys (Dream UX — based on competitive research)

<!-- Authoritative source: .ai/planning/USER-JOURNEYS.md (47 journeys, synthesized from 33 competitor apps) -->
<!-- These describe the IDEAL experience, not current state. -->

journeys:

# === ONBOARDING & FIRST LAUNCH (P0/P1/P2) ===

- id: J-01
  name: "Cold First Launch — Cinematic Welcome to First Content"
  priority: P0
  screen: onboarding
  dream: "Cinematic mandatory onboarding. Brand animation, profile creation, dynamic per-type source form, progressive content loading. Content visible within 90 seconds."
  reference: "Netflix (profile speed), TiviMate (fast validate-then-sync), Apple TV+ (cinematic reveal)"

- id: J-02
  name: "Add Additional Source (Post-Onboarding)"
  priority: P1
  screen: settings
  dream: "Add source from Settings without interrupting playback. Same dynamic per-type form. Channels merge automatically with duplicate detection."
  reference: "TiviMate (in-place URL editing), OTT Navigator (multi-source merge)"

- id: J-03
  name: "Returning User — Profile Picker to Resume"
  priority: P0
  screen: home
  dream: "Netflix-style profile tiles on launch. PIN protection with lockout. Last-used profile pre-focused. Per-profile state isolation."
  reference: "Netflix (profile grid + zoom animation), Disney+ (animated avatars), Plex (Who's Watching)"

- id: J-04
  name: "First-Time Content Discovery (Guided Tour)"
  priority: P2
  screen: home
  dream: "Getting Started checklist card on first home visit. 3-step guided exploration. Dismissible, never returns once dismissed."
  reference: "Google TV (For You explanation), Crunchyroll (genre picker), Netflix (taste calibration)"

# === LIVE TV CORE (P0/P1/P2) ===

- id: J-05
  name: "Channel Browsing — List View to Playback"
  priority: P0
  screen: live-tv
  dream: "Group sidebar + virtual channel list (10k+ channels). Inline EPG now/next. Sub-500ms zap. Alphabet quick-jump."
  reference: "TiviMate (virtual list + EPG inline), OTT Navigator (group sidebar), Smarters Pro (category cards)"

- id: J-06
  name: "Channel Zapping — Quick Switch While Watching"
  priority: P0
  screen: player
  dream: "D-pad up/down instant channel switch. Zap banner overlay. Rapid zap with deferred video load. Previous channel toggle."
  reference: "TiviMate (200-400ms zap), traditional cable TV (channel up/down)"

- id: J-07
  name: "Number Pad Direct Channel Entry"
  priority: P1
  screen: player
  dream: "Digit keys → large number overlay. Auto-switch after 1.5s timeout. Channel name preview. Configurable timeout."
  reference: "TiviMate (configurable timeout), OTT Navigator (number overlay), traditional cable TV"

- id: J-08
  name: "Favorite Channels Quick-Access"
  priority: P1
  screen: live-tv
  dream: "Long-press OK to favorite. Favorites group pinned in sidebar. Reorderable. Multiple named favorites groups."
  reference: "TiviMate (favorites group pinned, multiple lists), OTT Navigator (custom hotkey)"

- id: J-09
  name: "Channel Group Filtering and Custom Groups"
  priority: P2
  screen: live-tv
  dream: "Rename, hide, reorder groups. Create custom filter-based groups. Per-group sort. Hidden channel recovery."
  reference: "OTT Navigator (custom groups by filter rules), TiviMate (group reorder/rename/hide)"

- id: J-10
  name: "Live TV Mini-Guide Overlay (Now/Next Strip)"
  priority: P1
  screen: player
  dream: "Bottom strip overlay with now/next EPG. Cycle nearby channels. Watch from Start for catch-up. Auto-hide 5s."
  reference: "TiviMate (now/next sidebar), Hulu (live strip), YouTube TV (score overlays)"

# === EPG & PROGRAM GUIDE (P0/P1/P2) ===

- id: J-11
  name: "Full EPG Grid Navigation"
  priority: P0
  screen: epg
  dream: "Full-screen grid with PiP. Now-line. Past dimmed, current highlighted, future normal. Configurable density. 60fps scroll."
  reference: "TiviMate (canvas grid + PiP), YouTube TV (Material grid), Hulu (record from guide)"

- id: J-12
  name: "EPG Program Detail — Watch/Catch-Up/Remind"
  priority: P1
  screen: epg
  dream: "Bottom sheet with artwork, synopsis, cast. Context-dependent actions: Watch Now, Catch-Up, Remind Me."
  reference: "TiviMate (catch-up from EPG), Sparkle TV (program artwork), Plex (extras feel)"

- id: J-13
  name: "Multi-Day EPG Navigation"
  priority: P1
  screen: epg
  dream: "Day selector chips + date picker. 7 days back (catch-up) + 7 forward. Continuous scroll across midnight."
  reference: "TiviMate (7-day history + future, date picker), OTT Navigator (multi-EPG merge)"

- id: J-14
  name: "EPG Search and Filtering"
  priority: P2
  screen: epg
  dream: "Search programs by title across all channels. Filter chips: Live Now, Today, Catch-Up Available, genre."
  reference: "TiviMate (EPG search), Netflix (genre filtering), HBO Max (Lens filtering)"

# === VOD MOVIES (P0/P1/P2) ===

- id: J-15
  name: "Browse Movies by Genre Lanes"
  priority: P0
  screen: movies
  dream: "Hero with key art. Genre lanes with poster cards. Progressive image loading. Continue Watching first lane."
  reference: "Netflix (genre lanes + hero), Plex (poster grid + filters), Smarters Pro (TMDB metadata)"

- id: J-16
  name: "Movie Detail Screen"
  priority: P0
  screen: vod-detail
  dream: "Cinematic zoom-push transition. Backdrop art, synopsis, cast, similar titles. Play/Resume CTAs. Stream info badge."
  reference: "Netflix (full-bleed art + autoplay), Plex (ratings + extras + cast), Apple TV+ (cinematic reveal)"

- id: J-17
  name: "Movie Resume Watching"
  priority: P1
  screen: home
  dream: "Continue Watching lane sorted by recency. Direct resume on OK (no prompt). Position saved every 30s. Cross-device via Server Mode."
  reference: "Plex (On Deck gold standard), Netflix (cross-device resume), Jellyfin (per-user tracking)"

- id: J-18
  name: "Add Movie to Watchlist / Favorites"
  priority: P2
  screen: vod-detail
  dream: "One-press add from detail or long-press from any card. Instant optimistic UI update. Library → Watchlist section."
  reference: "Netflix (My List), Plex (Watchlist), Disney+ (cross-service Watchlist)"

# === VOD SERIES (P0/P1) ===

- id: J-19
  name: "Series Browse to Detail to Episode Play"
  priority: P0
  screen: series-detail
  dream: "Season chips, episode rows with thumbnails. Watched dimmed with checkmark. Next unwatched highlighted. Default to relevant season."
  reference: "Netflix (season/episode layout), Plex (season selector + grid), Smarters Pro (TMDB series)"

- id: J-20
  name: "Binge Watching — Auto-Advance with Countdown"
  priority: P0
  screen: player
  dream: "10s countdown card. Pre-buffer next episode 90s before end. Cancel button. Skip Intro/Credits/Recap. Still Watching after 3 episodes."
  reference: "Netflix (10s countdown, skip intro), Apple TV+ (Up Next queue), HBO Max (Skip Recap)"

- id: J-21
  name: "Up Next Queue and Continue Watching (Series)"
  priority: P1
  screen: home
  dream: "One card per series in Continue Watching (Plex pattern). Sorted by recency. Direct resume on OK."
  reference: "Plex On Deck (gold standard), Jellyfin Next Up, Apple TV+ Up Next"

- id: J-22
  name: "Series Progress Tracking"
  priority: P1
  screen: series-detail
  dream: "Per-episode watched/unwatched/in-progress states. Season-level progress. Bulk mark watched/unwatched."
  reference: "Jellyfin (bulk mark per-season), Netflix (watched dimming), Plex (per-item checkmark)"

# === SEARCH (P0/P1/P3) ===

- id: J-23
  name: "Universal Search — Live Results Grouped by Type"
  priority: P0
  screen: search
  dream: "Live-as-you-type results in <200ms. Grouped by type (channels, movies, series, EPG). Artwork-heavy, never text-only."
  reference: "Netflix (instant visual results), Google TV (universal), TiviMate (channel name search)"

- id: J-24
  name: "Browse by Category/Genre Filters"
  priority: P1
  screen: movies
  dream: "Filter chips (genre, year, rating, resolution). Multiple combinable filters. Instant re-filter. View toggle (lanes/grid)."
  reference: "HBO Max (Lens filtering), Netflix (genre taxonomy), Plex (multi-filter combine)"

- id: J-25
  name: "Recent Searches and Trending Content"
  priority: P3
  screen: search
  dream: "Recent searches as chips (per-profile). Popular channels section. Clear history option."
  reference: "Netflix (recent + trending), Google TV (voice suggestions), Crunchyroll (seasonal trending)"

# === PLAYER & PLAYBACK (P0/P1/P2) ===

- id: J-26
  name: "Full OSD Interaction — VOD Mode"
  priority: P0
  screen: player
  dream: "Zero UI until needed. Instant OSD. Thumbnail seek scrubbing. Secondary tray for audio/subs/speed/PiP. 3s auto-hide. 2-press Back to exit."
  reference: "Netflix (thumbnail seek), Apple TV+ (PiP), Plex (speed control, chapter markers)"

- id: J-27
  name: "Live TV OSD — Channel Info + EPG Strip + Timeshift"
  priority: P0
  screen: player
  dream: "Channel info + LIVE badge. EPG now/next strip. Timeshift seek bar. Jump to Live button. Stream quality badge."
  reference: "TiviMate (instant OSD), Hulu (live pause + timeshift), YouTube TV (DVR watch from start)"

- id: J-28
  name: "Audio/Subtitle Track Switching"
  priority: P1
  screen: player
  dream: "Right-slide panel. Codec + channels info per track. Subtitle delay +-100ms. Forced subs auto-enabled. Per-profile defaults."
  reference: "Netflix (right-slide panel), Jellyfin (codec info), Plex (subtitle delay adjust)"

- id: J-29
  name: "PiP Mode — Browse While Watching"
  priority: P1
  screen: player
  dream: "PiP window in corner. Persists across screen navigation. Repositionable. Audio continues. One-press return to fullscreen."
  reference: "Apple TV+ (best-in-class PiP), Hulu (PiP while browsing), Smarters Pro (Android PiP)"

- id: J-30
  name: "Skip Intro / Skip Credits / Skip Recap"
  priority: P1
  screen: player
  dream: "Contextual skip buttons. Not default-focused. Fade animation. Based on chapter markers or heuristics."
  reference: "Netflix (Skip Intro gold standard), HBO Max (Skip Recap), Jellyfin (Intro Skipper plugin)"

- id: J-31
  name: "Post-Play Screen"
  priority: P2
  screen: player
  dream: "Replay, More Like This, Back to Browse. Auto-dismiss after 60s. No auto-play of unrelated content for movies."
  reference: "Netflix (post-play recommendations), YouTube (autoplay + suggestions), Plex (Up Next queue)"

# === SETTINGS & CONFIGURATION (P0/P1/P2) ===

- id: J-32
  name: "Source Health Dashboard"
  priority: P0
  screen: settings
  dream: "Status cards per source. Health dots (green/yellow/red). Sync progress inline. Human-readable errors. Auto-sync config."
  reference: "TiviMate (playlist health), OTT Navigator (auto-sync schedule), Smarters Pro (health dots)"

- id: J-33
  name: "App Settings — Theme, Language, Quality, Behavior"
  priority: P1
  screen: settings
  dream: "Categorized settings. Immediate effect (no save button). Per-profile where appropriate. Accessibility font size."
  reference: "TiviMate (deep settings), Plex (per-user customization), Netflix (per-profile quality cap)"

- id: J-34
  name: "Backup/Restore Settings and Data"
  priority: P2
  screen: settings
  dream: "Export to JSON. Import with merge (non-destructive). Encrypted credentials stay encrypted. Cross-platform compatible."
  reference: "TiviMate (export/import), OTT Navigator (full config backup)"

- id: J-35
  name: "Diagnostics and Troubleshooting"
  priority: P2
  screen: settings
  dream: "System info, GPU pipeline level, network latency, player stats. Run Health Check. Export log."
  reference: "Plex (transcoding dashboard), VLC (codec information), TiviMate (ExoPlayer debug)"

# === PROFILE & PARENTAL (P1/P2) ===

- id: J-36
  name: "Create/Edit Profile"
  priority: P1
  screen: settings
  dream: "Name + avatar + Kids toggle + PIN toggle. Edit/delete with confirmation. Cannot delete last profile."
  reference: "Netflix (profile creation), Disney+ (kids profile indicator), Plex (managed users)"

- id: J-37
  name: "Kids Profile — Restricted Content and Simplified UI"
  priority: P2
  screen: home
  dream: "Brighter UI, larger cards, simplified nav. Age-rated content filter. PIN required to exit. Parent-reviewable history."
  reference: "Netflix (kids UI skin), Disney+ (character browsing, age-gate), Hulu (kids filter)"

- id: J-38
  name: "Parental Controls Configuration"
  priority: P2
  screen: settings
  dream: "Master PIN. Per-profile content rating cap. Channel/group blocking. Viewing time limits. Activity log."
  reference: "TiviMate (PIN per-channel, time locking), Netflix (per-profile maturity), Disney+ (age-gate PIN)"

# === LIBRARY & FAVORITES (P1/P2) ===

- id: J-39
  name: "Favorites Management and Custom Collections"
  priority: P1
  screen: library
  dream: "Unified library hub: Continue Watching, Watchlist, Favorites, History. Custom collections with mixed content types."
  reference: "Netflix (My List), Plex (collections + playlists), TiviMate (multiple favorites groups)"

- id: J-40
  name: "Watch History and Activity"
  priority: P2
  screen: library
  dream: "Chronological history. Filter by type/date. Individual entry removal. Per-profile isolation."
  reference: "Jellyfin (per-user activity), Netflix (clearable activity), Plex (play history + scrobble)"

# === MULTI-DEVICE & SERVER MODE (P1/P2) ===

- id: J-41
  name: "Server Mode — Serve WASM UI to Browser Clients"
  priority: P1
  screen: settings
  dream: "Enable toggle. WebSocket API + HTTP WASM server. QR code for access. Connected client list. Authentication option."
  reference: "Plex (server + clients), Jellyfin (web client from server), Stremio (addon streaming)"

- id: J-42
  name: "Cross-Device Resume via Server Mode"
  priority: P2
  screen: home
  dream: "Resume position syncs between native and browser clients via server DB. Timestamp-based conflict resolution."
  reference: "Plex (account-based sync), Netflix (cross-device resume), Infuse (iCloud sync)"

# === ACCESSIBILITY & ERROR RECOVERY (P0/P1) ===

- id: J-43
  name: "D-Pad / Remote-Only Full Navigation"
  priority: P0
  screen: all
  dream: "Every element reachable via D-pad. Focus memory. No dead-ends. 3px+ focus ring. 5-button minimum. Max 3 nav levels."
  reference: "Apple TV+ (parallax focus), Android TV Leanback (focus framework), TiviMate (zero-mouse)"

- id: J-44
  name: "Network Failure — Graceful Degradation and Recovery"
  priority: P0
  screen: all
  dream: "Buffer grace period. Auto-retry with exponential backoff. Cached content browsable offline. Multi-source failover. Auto-recovery."
  reference: "Plex (relay fallback), Stremio (addon retry), YouTube TV (buffering + auto-recovery)"

- id: J-45
  name: "Stream Failure — Automatic Failover and Quality Downgrade"
  priority: P1
  screen: player
  dream: "4-step auto-recovery (restart decoder → reconnect → alternate stream → alternate source). Quality downgrade with notification."
  reference: "TiviMate (ExoPlayer recovery), Plex (quality ladder), OTT Navigator (multi-source failover)"

# === PRIVACY & CONSENT (P1/P3) ===

- id: J-46
  name: "First-Launch Privacy Consent"
  priority: P1
  screen: onboarding
  dream: "Three toggles all default OFF. Clear explanations. Continue without opt-in. Changeable in Settings later."
  reference: "Apple (granular consent), GDPR best practices (no pre-ticked)"

- id: J-47
  name: "Analytics Opt-In/Out Management"
  priority: P3
  screen: settings
  dream: "Same toggles as initial consent. Detailed data explanations. Delete My Data option."
  reference: "Apple (per-category management), Firefox (data collection dashboard)"

## Observable Visual QA (OVQA) Configuration

screenshot_test_command: cargo test -p crispy-ui --test screenshots
screenshot_output_dir: rust/crates/crispy-ui/tests/output
screenshot_golden_dir: rust/crates/crispy-ui/tests/golden
screenshot_fixtures_dir: rust/crates/crispy-ui/tests/fixtures
screenshot_pipeline_env: CRISPY_PIPELINE
screenshot_resolution_env: CRISPY_TEST_RESOLUTION
planning_dir: .ai/planning
journey_spec: .ai/planning/USER-JOURNEYS.md
design_spec: .ai/crispy_tivi_design_spec.md
design_context: .impeccable.md

ovqa_pipelines:
  - name: stub
    description: "Fast offline regression with static test data"
    command: "CRISPY_PIPELINE=stub cargo test -p crispy-ui --test screenshots"
    output: rust/crates/crispy-ui/tests/output/stub
    golden: rust/crates/crispy-ui/tests/golden/stub
    requires_local: false

  - name: cached
    description: "Real data regression (cached from previous E2E sync)"
    command: "CRISPY_PIPELINE=cached cargo test -p crispy-ui --test screenshots"
    output: rust/crates/crispy-ui/tests/output/cached
    golden: rust/crates/crispy-ui/tests/golden/cached
    requires_local: true

  - name: e2e
    description: "Full E2E with fresh DB, real source sync, user simulation"
    command: "CRISPY_PIPELINE=e2e cargo test -p crispy-ui --test screenshots"
    output: rust/crates/crispy-ui/tests/output/e2e
    golden: rust/crates/crispy-ui/tests/golden/e2e
    requires_local: true
